verifiedClaims.claim: Tea Sapling current sell price is 250g.
Tea Sapling recipe is mailed the day after Caroline's 2-heart event.
Tea Sapling takes 20 days to mature and produces Tea Leaves during the final week of each season except winter outdoors.
Tea Leaves are the crop produced by Tea Bushes.

unverifiedClaims.claim: Official 1.6 changelog confirms the Tea Sapling sell-price change.
unverifiedClaims.reason: Official changelog extraction failed in this environment; Wiki currently verifies current price but not this changelog claim.

unverifiedClaims.claim: 100 saplings cash out to about 25,000g before material opportunity cost.
unverifiedClaims.reason: Derived estimate; source verifies 250g unit price but not this exact scenario.

recommendedMoneyGuideChanges.notes: Wiki sources verify current Tea Sapling price and recipe path. Keep versionRisk high until official 1.6 changelog or wiki history is reviewed.

verifiedClaims.claim: Fish Smoker recipe is purchased from the Fish Shop for 10,000g.
Fish Smoker crafting ingredients are 10 Hardwood, 1 Sea Jelly, 1 River Jelly, and 1 Cave Jelly.
Fish Smoker uses any fish and 1 coal to create Smoked Fish.
Smoked Fish processing time is 50 minutes.
Smoked Fish doubles fish sell price while retaining quality.
Smoked Fish is an Artisan Good.
Smoked Fish benefits from Fisher, Angler, and Artisan professions.
Catfish and Lava Eel can be used as high-value fish examples.

unverifiedClaims.claim: Official 1.6 changelog confirms Fish Smoker introduction.
unverifiedClaims.reason: Official changelog extraction failed in this environment; Wiki verifies current mechanics but not the official changelog text.

unverifiedClaims.claim: Spring rainy-day Catfish model yields about 16,800g per efficient day.
unverifiedClaims.reason: Derived gameplay estimate; source pages verify item mechanics and fish values, not this daily route output.

unverifiedClaims.claim: Profession-boosted active day yields about 21,000g to 25,200g.
unverifiedClaims.reason: Derived gameplay estimate based on route assumptions; not directly stated by source pages.

recommendedMoneyGuideChanges.notes: Wiki sources verify core Fish Smoker mechanics and profession interactions. Keep exact daily profit estimates under review because they depend on route assumptions.
